case_title: MICHAEL BRAUDE VS. DAMEON CALDERON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRAUDE, MICHAEL
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO DISMISS DEFENDANT:TONY SILVER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRAUDE, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-12-2014 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
